name: Snapcraft
description: Build and publish snaps — Canonicals universal Linux package format with confinement and auto-updates.

seo.title: Snapcraft — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: Snapcraft: Build and publish snaps — Canonicals universal Linux package format with confinement and auto-updates.

when_to_use: Build and publish snaps with auto-update delivery
Universal Linux package with confinement sandboxing
Multi-architecture snap builds for x64 and ARM

pros: Confinement and interface system improves security
Backed by Canonical with commercial support
cons: Snap daemon and compression cause startup latency
Controversial outside Ubuntu, some distros ban it
Forced refresh timing has angered users
review.verdict: A capable packaging system chained to a single controversial store — fine inside Ubuntu, divisive outside.
review.best_for: Apps targeting Ubuntu desktop and server with auto-updates and confinement.
review.not_for: Projects that value decentralized, distro-neutral distribution.
